ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film (e.g., Action, Drama, Comedy) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office earnings of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the film */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the review is for */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Full text of the review */,
  "phrase" TEXT /* Extracted phrase from the review */,
  "phrase_ids" INTEGER /* IDs of the phrase in the review */,
  "splitset_label" INTEGER /* Label indicating whether the review is part of a split set */,
  "sentiment_values" REAL /* Sentiment analysis value for the review */,
  "revised_sentiment_values" REAL /* Revised sentiment analysis value for the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment analysis model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment analysis model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the result is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "sentiment_value" REAL /* Sentiment analysis value for the review */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES sentiment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review or result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review or result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES sentiment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_logs" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the review or result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review exported */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the review or result was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES sentiment_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
